svg.title: NVFLARE federated learning communication flow
svg.desc: FL server at top broadcasts global model to three city sites. Sites return CKKS-encrypted noisy gradients. Server aggregates homomorphically and repeats. Admin console manages from bottom-left.
svg.text: global model broadcast (plaintext — server only decrypts aggregate)
CKKS ciphertexts uploaded (noisy gradients — no plaintext leaves site)

g.text: Decrypt aggregate only → new global model
